title: Protect local insight data
description: Keep requests, reports, private evidence, stores, backups, candidates, temporary artifacts, and diagnostics inside the trusted owner-controlled local boundary.
target: Zero financial payload, merchant-text, report-content, credential, or private-path disclosures in process arguments, ordinary logs, stderr, telemetry, crash output, Git, or shared temporary files; 100% of INSIGHTS directories use owner-only access such as 0700 and files use 0600 where supported; explicit structured business results are the only payload output.
load_condition: Success, validation failure, compatibility failure, source mismatch, resource failure, persistence failure, crash, retry, deletion, private policy validation, backup, verify, restore, and migration on every supported host.
measurement: Permission and ownership inspection plus seeded-canary scans of process tables, stdout exclusions, stderr, logs, telemetry hooks, crash artifacts, repository status, temp roots, backups, restore candidates, and cleanup state.
rationale: Insight reports concentrate sensitive behavioral and financial interpretation beyond the underlying totals.
